description: SD 1.5 + Pixel Art LoRA — pixel-art / 16-bit retro style
_comment: LoRA by SedatAl, trained on jainr3/diffusiondb-pixelart dataset using SD 1.5.
_comment_trigger: No dedicated trigger word. Use descriptive pixel-art vocabulary: 'pixel art', '16 bit', 'retro game sprite', '8-bit', etc.
_comment_prompt: Examples: 'pixel art dragon on a mountain', 'pixel art thor holding hammer', 'pixel art portrait, 16 bit, retro RPG'.
_comment_steps: 50 steps for crisp pixel edges; 30 is sufficient for quick tests.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7–8 works well for SD 1.5 LoRAs.
_comment_size: SD 1.5 native resolution is 512x512. 640x640 and 768x768 also work.
